description: Find an element on the page using CSS selector or XPath. Bare selectors are treated as CSS; use text:... for text matching.

selector.description: CSS selector or XPath to find the element. Bare selectors are CSS; use text:... for text matching or explicit tag:/css:/xpath:/@attr locators.
selector.title: Selector

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for element
timeout.title: Timeout

name: element_find
title: Find Element

description: Click an element found by CSS selector or XPath. Bare selectors are treated as CSS; use text:... for text matching.

selector.title: Selector

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for element
timeout.title: Timeout

text.description: Text to type into the element
text.title: Text

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds to wait for element
